skill1.kitLine: Activates when landing a Full Charge attack. Affects all allies.
skill1.note: Activation clause for the shield-damage bullet; dropped together with its effect because the v1 raid boss is partless and never shields. Not a shield GRANT, so no shield/shielded-trigger synergy orphaned.

skill1.kitLine: Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 100.09% for 3 sec.
skill1.note: Offensive buff vs an ENEMY shield; no StatKey for shield-damage and boss never shields. Inert at current scope; resurface if a shielded boss enters scope.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when landing an attack on a target's core. Affects all allies.
skill1.note: Modeled as shotFired+requiresCore rather than a literal core-landing trigger; at scope-lock 100% core exposure this refreshes every shot → near-permanent. Inert at coreHitRate 0.
Ally pierceDamagePct; inert for non-pierce allies but feeds Pierce carriers (alice/red-hood) and Mari herself via her S2 pierce.

skill2.note: Self-targeting of bullet 1 captured by the self block.

No timed-pierce primitive; modeled as static hasPierce. Under the ⚑ shotFired trigger the 5s grant refreshes every ~1.4s pull → uptime ≈100% while firing, so static ≈ faithful. Verbatim line retained in unmodeled because a config flag is not a block. Coupled to the kit-silent trigger ⚑ — remove flag if trigger resolves burst-gated.
Self ATK buff riding the estimated shotFired trigger.
Ally-targeting of bullet 2 captured by the allies block.

skill2.kitLine: ATK ▲ 30.78% of the skill user's ATK for 5 sec.
skill2.note: Flat add off Mari's own ATK (casterAtkPct), riding the same estimated shotFired trigger.

burst.note: Prose says 'all enemies'; block targets single enemy. In the partless single-boss raid the one boss takes the full value, so equivalent at current scope.

burst.kitLine: Deals 639.36% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.note: burstCast nuke → engine auto FB-exempt, snapshots pre-FB; noFb NOT set. Single boss takes full value.
Ally-targeting of the burst buff captured by the allies block.
Trigger is burstCast NOT fullBurstEnter (hard-rule-6): buff fires only on rotations SHE bursts; a second B2 in the team must not proc it.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: trigger is KIT-SILENT — modeled as refresh-on-shot (near-permanent while firing); if the real trigger is burst-gated this over-credits out-of-Full-Burst uptime.
documentedConfounds.why: ShotFired gives near-permanent self atkPct + ally casterAtkPct; a burst-gated reality would cut ally-ATK uptime to ~5s/rotation, so the current model would OVER-credit damage → sim runs HOT. This is the TOP per-unit ⚑ (note ⚑3).

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: 'Gain Pierce for 5 sec' modeled as static hasPierce (no timed-pierce primitive); tied to the same ⚑ trigger estimate.
documentedConfounds.why: Static pierce = permanent; coupled to the trigger ⚑. Faithful only while she fires continuously; if trigger resolves burst-gated, pierce uptime is over-credited → HOT. Magnitude scales with how many pierce carriers benefit.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: 'Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 100.09%' unmodeled — the raid boss is partless and never shields.
documentedConfounds.why: Inert at current scope: there is no shield to damage and no StatKey for shield-damage. No gap for the partless v1 boss; becomes COLD only if a shielded boss ever enters scope.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑2 SR AUTOFIRE vs 22f BOLT GAP — engine default ships bolt gap ON (no charFixes.noBoltRecovery); autofire would add ~15–20% shots.
documentedConfounds.why: Model assumes the 22-frame bolt gap (fewer shots). If Mari actually autofires, real shot count is ~15–20% higher → sim UNDER-counts her own (minor) SR damage and buff refreshes → COLD. Direction flips only if her true cadence is slower than modeled.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑1 CADENCE TUPLE — datamined chargeFrames 60 + 22f bolt gap (~1.37s/shot), reloadFrames 141, ammo 6, no rolling reload; mag-empty ~8.2s, no implausibility tell.
documentedConfounds.why: Datamined numbers are plausible and internally consistent (no implausibility tell); low gap risk on their own. Gap exposure is via ⚑2 (autofire) rather than the tuple itself.

authorIntentSummary: Parser-baseline HYPOTHESIS (explicitly not validated/measured). The author modeled Mari as an SR/Burst-II ally-ATK + Pierce support: S1 core-hit pierce-damage buff to allies (shotFired+requiresCore), S2 self atkPct + ally casterAtkPct on an ESTIMATED shotFired trigger, a static hasPierce config standing in for the S2 'Gain Pierce 5s' grant, and a burstCast nuke (FB-exempt, pre-FB snapshot) plus a burstCast—not fullBurstEnter—ally attackDamagePct buff (hard-rule-6). Key approximations: the S2 trigger is kit-silent (TOP ⚑) and the pierce is static-not-timed, both of which over-credit uptime if the real trigger is burst-gated (HOT risk); the S1 shield-damage line is deliberately dropped as inert vs the partless boss; and SR cadence/autofire are unmeasured (COLD risk if she autofires). No board data exists yet for mari.
